title: New Orleans, LA (3701 General DeGaulle Dr)

stages.desc: One of 5 3-Stages in Louisiana to undergo Concept Unification. Last 3-Stage and MMBB stage in Louisiana from November 2021 until removal in March 2023. Was in decent condition, stage had lighting similar to the former Wilmington, Delaware 3-Stage, Chuck had Rockstar Jeans, and Pasqually had clear drumfront with explosion logo.
